title: Core Paid Media Denormalized Names
description: Optional denormalized entity names for paid media summary datasets. Intended for ingestion shapes where lookup datasets are not available (e.g., MCA single-dataset feeds) and entity names must be carried inline on each summary row. Lookup-driven ingestions should leave these fields null and resolve names via the corresponding lookup datasets.

xdm:denormalizedNames.title: Denormalized Names
xdm:denormalizedNames.description: Entity display names carried inline on the summary row when lookup datasets are not available.

xdm:accountName.title: Account Name
xdm:accountName.description: Display name of the ad account. Mirrors accountDetails.accountName from the account lookup.

xdm:campaignName.title: Campaign Name
xdm:campaignName.description: Display name of the campaign. Mirrors metadata.name from the campaign lookup.

xdm:adGroupName.title: Ad Group Name
xdm:adGroupName.description: Display name of the ad group/ad set/ad squad. Mirrors metadata.name from the ad group lookup.

xdm:adName.title: Ad Name
xdm:adName.description: Display name of the individual ad. Mirrors metadata.name from the ad lookup.

xdm:experienceName.title: Experience Name
xdm:experienceName.description: Display name of the creative experience. Mirrors metadata.name from the experience lookup.

xdm:assetName.title: Asset Name
xdm:assetName.description: Display name of the creative asset. Mirrors metadata.name from the asset lookup.

xdm:portfolioName.title: Portfolio Name
xdm:portfolioName.description: Display name of the portfolio (Amazon Ads and similar platforms).
